en.title: How Does Your Ex Remember You?
en.subtitle: What version of you lives in their head?
en.description: Find out what kind of ex-partner memory you've left behind

ko.title: 전 애인 기억 속 나 테스트
ko.subtitle: 전 애인은 나를 어떻게 기억할까?
ko.description: 전 애인의 기억 속에 내가 어떤 사람으로 남았는지 알아보세요
ko.shareText: 전 애인 기억 속 나는 어떤 사람?

en.text:
What role did you usually play
in your past relationships?

ko.text:
연애할 때 나는 주로
어떤 역할이었어?

en.text: The one who always took care of everything for my partner

ko.text: 이것저것 다 챙겨주는 든든한 보호자 역할이었다

options.rationale: Active caregiving initiative (Ignite) + emotionally-driven nurture (Pulse) + partner-centered action (Bond)

en.text: The mood maker who kept things fun and entertaining

ko.text: 분위기를 띄우고 웃기게 만드는 에너지 담당이었다

options.rationale: Active energy creation (Ignite) + spontaneous humor generation (Pulse) + self-expressive entertainment style (Self)

en.text: The emotional and sentimental one in the relationship

ko.text: 감성적인 분위기를 만들고 깊은 대화를 이끌었다

options.rationale: Internal emotional processing (Observe) + deep sentimental feeling (Pulse) + inner world cultivation (Self)

en.text: The relaxed one who let my partner take the lead mostly

ko.text: 여유롭게 상대한테 맡기고 편하게 따라가는 편이었다

options.rationale: Passive adaptive stance (Observe) + rational role assessment (Prism) + partner-deferring orientation (Bond)

en.text:
When you had a fight
with your partner, what did you do?

ko.text:
연인과 싸웠을 때
나의 반응은 주로?

en.text: I always apologized first and tried to fix things right away

ko.text: 내가 먼저 사과하고 빨리 풀어보려고 노력했다

options.rationale: Repair initiative (Ignite) + emotionally-driven reconciliation (Pulse) + relationship preservation priority (Bond)

en.text: I pulled back and gave us both space until things cooled down

ko.text: 서로 거리를 두고 감정이 가라앉을 때까지 기다렸다

options.rationale: Strategic withdrawal (Observe) + rational cooling period (Prism) + independent self-regulation (Self)

en.text: I cracked jokes to lighten the mood and break the tension

ko.text: 농담으로 분위기를 풀어보려고 했다 웃기면 해결된다고 믿었다

options.rationale: Active tension-breaking (Ignite) + humor as instinctive response (Pulse) + self-expression through comedy (Self)

en.text: I ended up crying a lot and couldn't control my emotions

ko.text: 감정 조절이 안 돼서 결국 많이 울었다

options.rationale: Emotional overwhelm (Observe) + uncontrolled feeling surge (Pulse) + relationship-anxiety driven (Bond)

en.text:
How well did you remember
anniversaries and special dates?

ko.text:
기념일이나 이벤트를
나는 얼마나 잘 챙겼어?

en.text: I planned everything perfectly down to the last detail every time

ko.text: 디테일 하나까지 꼼꼼하게 준비하는 편이었다

options.rationale: Proactive planning effort (Ignite) + detail-oriented preparation (Prism) + partner experience priority (Bond)

en.text: I tried my best but sometimes forgot or got the date mixed up

ko.text: 나름 챙기려 했는데 가끔 까먹거나 날짜를 헷갈렸다

options.rationale: Effort with imperfection (Ignite) + feeling-based engagement (Pulse) + caring intent (Bond)

en.text: I honestly forgot more often than I'd like to admit

ko.text: 솔직히 깜빡하는 경우가 더 많았다

options.rationale: Disengaged from conventions (Observe) + rational de-prioritization (Prism) + self-standard independence (Self)

en.text: I thought showing love daily matters more than special dates

ko.text: 기념일보다 평소에 잘하는 게 더 중요하다고 생각했다

options.rationale: Philosophical reframing (Observe) + principle-based reasoning (Prism) + own value system priority (Self)

en.text:
When your ex was going through
a rough time, what did you do?

ko.text:
전 애인이 힘들어할 때
나는 어떻게 했어?

en.text: I dropped everything and rushed over to be by their side

ko.text: 하던 일 다 제쳐두고 달려가서 옆에 있어줬다

options.rationale: Immediate action response (Ignite) + emotionally-driven urgency (Pulse) + partner needs priority (Bond)

en.text: I listened to everything without judging or giving advice

ko.text: 조언보다 일단 끝까지 들어주는 게 먼저라고 생각했다

options.rationale: Receptive listening stance (Observe) + empathic holding space (Pulse) + complete other-focus (Bond)

en.text: I helped them think through the problem and find real solutions

ko.text: 같이 해결책을 찾아보면서 실질적으로 도와줬다

options.rationale: Active problem-solving (Ignite) + analytical thinking approach (Prism) + solution-oriented detachment (Self)

en.text: I gave them space because they needed time to process alone

ko.text: 혼자만의 시간이 필요할 거라 판단하고 기다려줬다

options.rationale: Distance-giving (Observe) + rational space assessment (Prism) + independent processing respect (Self)

en.text:
How often did you
reach out to each other?

ko.text:
연인과의 연락 빈도는
어떤 편이었어?

en.text: I was always the one who texted first throughout the day

ko.text: 항상 내가 먼저 연락해서 하루 종일 대화했다

options.rationale: Always-initiating pattern (Ignite) + emotionally-driven reaching out (Pulse) + partner-directed attention (Bond)

en.text: We texted back and forth pretty evenly throughout the day

ko.text: 서로 비슷하게 주고받으면서 균형이 맞았다

options.rationale: Balanced reciprocity (Observe) + measured exchange (Prism) + mutual independence (Self)

en.text: They reached out way more than I did if I'm being honest

ko.text: 솔직히 상대가 나보다 훨씬 더 많이 연락했다

options.rationale: Passive communication pattern (Observe) + receiving rather than sending (Pulse) + self-contained presence (Self)

en.text: Texting was rare but we really clicked whenever we met up

ko.text: 연락은 적어도 만나면 잘 통해서 문제없었다

options.rationale: Quality-over-quantity approach (Ignite in person) + chemistry-based connection (Pulse) + authenticity priority (Self)

en.text:
When the relationship ended,
how did you handle it?

ko.text:
연애가 끝날 때
나의 마지막 모습은?

en.text: I tried really hard to end things on the best terms possible

ko.text: 마지막까지 좋게 마무리하려고 최선을 다했다

options.rationale: Active graceful-ending effort (Ignite) + emotionally-motivated closure (Pulse) + relationship dignity priority (Bond)

en.text: I accepted it calmly and moved on without too much drama

ko.text: 담담하게 받아들이고 크게 요동 없이 정리했다

options.rationale: Calm acceptance (Observe) + rational processing (Prism) + self-directed forward movement (Self)

en.text: I cried so much that I couldn't function for a while

ko.text: 한동안 일상이 안 될 정도로 많이 울었다

options.rationale: Emotional flooding (Observe/passive) + overwhelming feeling response (Pulse) + loss-of-connection grief (Bond)

en.text: I laughed in disbelief because it all felt so surreal to me

ko.text: 믿기지가 않아서 어이없게 웃음이 나왔다

options.rationale: Unexpected reaction expression (Ignite) + surreal feeling processing (Pulse) + self-protective humor (Self)

en.text:
Looking back at your relationships,
how much did you change for them?

ko.text:
연애하면서 나는
얼마나 변했다고 생각해?

en.text: I changed a lot — I always adjusted myself to fit my partner

ko.text: 상대에 맞춰서 나 자신을 많이 바꿨던 것 같다

options.rationale: Partner-adaptive molding (Observe) + feeling-driven sacrifice (Pulse) + other-prioritizing self-erasure (Bond)

en.text: I stayed pretty much the same — my core never really shifted

ko.text: 크게 변하지 않았다 나는 원래 이런 사람이다

options.rationale: Consistent self-maintenance (Observe) + rational self-preservation (Prism) + core identity protection (Self)

en.text: I grew as a person and learned things I'm grateful for now

ko.text: 좋은 쪽으로 성장했다 배운 게 많은 연애였다

options.rationale: Growth-embracing engagement (Ignite) + reflective learning (Prism) + mutual enrichment (Bond)

en.text: I lost parts of myself and I'm still figuring out who I am

ko.text: 나다움을 잃어버렸고 아직도 되찾는 중이다

options.rationale: Identity dissolution processing (Observe) + confused self-feeling (Pulse) + self-recovery seeking (Self)

en.title: The Warmth I Still Miss
en.description: Your ex thinks about you and feels a pang of 'I had someone really special.' You gave more than most — and they know it, even if they didn't say it enough.

ko.title: 그리운 온기
ko.description: 전 애인 기억 속에서 당신은 따뜻하고 다정한 사람이에요. '그 사람은 진짜 나를 많이 아껴줬는데'라는 말을 들을 타입이에요. 이런 사람 다시 만나기 힘들다는 걸 전 애인도 알고 있을 거예요.

en.title: Cool but Unforgettable
en.description: Your ex remembers someone composed and independent. 'They had it together' — even if inside you were falling apart sometimes. That poise left an impression.

ko.title: 쿨했지만 아쉬웠던 사람
ko.description: 전 애인 기억 속에서 당신은 멋있고 독립적인 사람이에요. '참 어른스러웠는데'라는 말을 들을 타입이에요. 가끔 차갑게 느꼈을 수 있지만 그 여유로움이 매력이었을 거예요.

en.title: Still Makes Me Smile
en.description: Your ex smiles when they think of you. 'We laughed so much back then.' You made hard days bearable and boring days memorable. That's a rare gift.
en.compatibility: The One I Never Figured Out

ko.title: 웃음이 떠오르는 사람
ko.description: 전 애인 기억 속에서 당신은 항상 웃음을 주는 사람이에요. '그때 진짜 많이 웃었는데'라는 말을 들을 타입이에요. 힘들 때도 웃게 만들어준 소중한 사람으로 기억될 거예요.

en.title: The Love That Stayed
en.description: Your ex can't shake the feeling you left behind. 'They loved with everything they had — and that kind of love leaves a mark.' Your depth of feeling wasn't too much. It was the real thing in a world where most people keep score. That wholehearted love is what makes you unforgettable.

ko.title: 떠나고도 남은 사랑
ko.description: 전 애인 기억 속에서 당신은 온 마음을 다한 사람이에요. '그 사람처럼 사랑하는 사람은 또 못 만날 거야'라는 말을 들을 타입이에요. 셈하지 않고 진심으로 사랑한 그 깊이가 오래도록 기억에 남을 거예요.

en.title: The One I Never Figured Out
en.description: Your ex still can't figure you out. 'I never fully understood what they were thinking.' That enigma keeps you in their mind rent-free, honestly.

ko.title: 알다가도 모를 사람
ko.description: 전 애인 기억 속에서 당신은 끝까지 파악이 안 됐던 사람이에요. '아직도 그 사람이 뭘 생각했는지 모르겠어'라는 말을 들을 타입이에요. 그 신비로움이 오래도록 기억될 거예요.
